vocab.meaning: vui chơi một cách tự do, không gò bó
vocab.example: My weekends were filled with uninhibited play, running through the fields without a care in the world.
I found my creative spark early on through finger painting and building sandcastles.

vocab.meaning: đưa ai đó đi nhanh chóng (đến thế giới khác/nơi khác)
vocab.example: Reading adventure stories would whisk me away to magical realms and far-off galaxies.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác kinh ngạc và tò mò
vocab.example: Stargazing on clear nights always instilled in me a profound sense of wonderment about the universe.
Playing neighborhood football matches was less about the sport and more about communal bonding.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp giữa tay và mắt
vocab.example: I was obsessed with arcade games, which significantly sharpened my hand-eye coordination.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn bè cùng lứa
vocab.example: Building secret forts in the backyard provided a perfect setting for meaningful peer interaction.
I had boundless energy as a toddler, constantly jumping on the trampoline until dusk.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ/kiến thức
vocab.example: Solving complex riddles with my father was a favorite activity that fed my intellectual curiosity.

vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng thoát ly thực tế (tìm niềm vui trong tưởng tượng)
vocab.example: Video games served as a form of pure escapism for me after a long day of elementary school.
